code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut total = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  mut b = 32
  if not is_end
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 32
    end
  end
  let is_ws = is_end or b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(x)
        if x % 2 == 0
          total = total + x
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("sum_even=#{total}")
